message:
fix: Mission Control demo state overrides empty persisted state (#5360)

On console.kubestellar.io, a previous empty MC session saved
{phase:'define', projects:[]} to localStorage, which took priority
over the demo blueprint data. Now checks if persisted state has no
projects in demo mode and replaces it with the demo deployment.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
